ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the industry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the industry record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field or category of the data (e.g., V2, V3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual data value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data value was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Actual year the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the year record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field or category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the field was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report belongs to */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the visualization was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_file" TEXT /* File path to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the forecasting model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Actual forecast value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the forecast was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast the prediction is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Actual prediction value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)
